item.title: SPIKE: The Render Animation Feasibility
item.intent: Validate the snapshot-based Core Animation approach for The Render signature transition at 120fps
item.description: Prototype the snapshot-based Core Animation approach for The Render (source-to-rich text transition). Capture layer snapshots, compute target positions, animate with CASpringAnimation (~400ms, damping 0.8, response 0.4). Measure frame rate on iPad Pro (ProMotion) and iPhone SE. Test with documents of varying sizes (10 lines, 100 lines, 1000 lines). Test Reduced Motion crossfade path. Blocks FEAT-014 (Signature Transition). Updates architecture decision [A-020].
acceptanceCriteria: Prototype demonstrates source-to-rich animation with at least heading and bold transitions
Frame rate measured on iPad Pro (target: 120fps) and iPhone SE (target: 60fps)
Architecture decision [A-020] updated based on findings
